criteria.label: Startup Experience
criteria.detail: At least one of the companies worked for is 10-200 employees

criteria.label: Work Recency
criteria.detail: Most recent position is up until the present or at most  ended 3 months ago

criteria.label: Sales Experience
criteria.detail: At least 2 years as an Account Executive OR at least 3 years as a BDR/SDR. SaaS experience preferred.

criteria.label: Startup Background
criteria.detail: At least one employer was a startup or company with under 200 employees. Ideally 10–100 employees.

criteria.label: Education
criteria.detail: Note whether they have a bachelor's degree and when they graduated.

criteria.label: Quota Attainment
criteria.detail: Resume explicitly mentions exceeding quota (e.g. '130% of quota', 'exceeded targets', '#1 rep').

criteria.label: Employment Recency
criteria.detail: Currently employed OR most recent role ended within 2 months of today. Year-only end dates are treated as December of that year.

criteria.label: Engineering Experience
criteria.detail: 7+ years of full stack engineering experience. SaaS experience preferred.

criteria.label: Education
criteria.detail: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Management Systems, Applied Math, or a related technical/CS field. Must have graduated in 2020 or earlier.

criteria.label: Python
criteria.detail: Python must explicitly appear on the resume as a language they have used.

criteria.label: Location
criteria.detail: Must be in commuting distance (30 miles) of Marina Del Rey, CA

criteria.label: React
criteria.detail: React experience noted on resume.

criteria.label: AWS
criteria.detail: AWS experience noted on resume.

criteria.label: AI / Voice AI Experience
criteria.detail: Experience at an AI product or AI SaaS company, or voice AI / speech tech experience.

criteria.label: Prestigious University
criteria.detail: Attended a top 50 US university.

criteria.label: Sales Experience
criteria.detail: 3+ months in a sales or sales adjacent role.

criteria.label: Bachelors Degree Or Higher
criteria.detail: Bachelor's Degree or higher degree -  graduating in May 2026 or earlier.

criteria.label: Startup Experience
criteria.detail: Worked for a company with 200 or less employees

criteria.label: SaaS Experience
criteria.detail: Experience selling a SaaS tool or working for a SaaS company

criteria.label: Employment Recency
criteria.detail: Most recent job is until "present" or at max 3 months ago. A year without a month is treated as July of that year.

criteria.label: Product Manager Experience
criteria.detail: 3+ years as a product manager or senior product manager or principal product manager

criteria.label: AI Product Experience
criteria.detail: Experience working for an AI native company or on a product that involves AI

criteria.label: Startup Experience
criteria.detail: At least one of the companies on the resume is sub 200 employees

criteria.label: Location
criteria.detail: Based in a 30 mile radius from Brooklyn, NY or Marina Del Rey, CA. OR states on the resume that they are open to relocation.
